Title: P7_ValidateTWSJobConfiguration
Step Action: Log into Jira and navigate to the client-specific backlog
Locate the TWS job configuration ticket for this tenant
Step Expected Result: Ticket exists with title format: TWS Jobs Setup - [Tenant Name]

Step Action: Verify the ticket description includes links to TWS job specifications and database details
Step Expected Result: Both links are present and navigate to correct resources

Step Action: Confirm the ticket is assigned to the TWS Team and status is Done or has completion comment
Step Expected Result: Ticket indicates job configuration is complete

Step Action: Review job configuration documentation for connection string correctness
Step Expected Result: Connection strings match the tenant database servers from Environment Variables

Title: P7_ValidateTWSJobExecution
Step Action: Confirm with the TWS Team that test job executions have been scheduled and executed
Request and review job execution logs for any critical errors
Step Expected Result: Logs show successful executions with no critical errors or failures

Step Action: Verify that automated job schedules are correctly configured per business requirements
Step Expected Result: Job schedules documented and match business process timelines

Step Action: Confirm TWS team sign-off on job configuration and execution
Step Expected Result: Formal sign-off documented from TWS team
